display.purpose: Day date number — the largest text on screen. One instance per view.

headline.purpose: Empty-state headings and no-school titles only.

title.purpose: Entree items — the highest-priority food content.

body.purpose: Secondary section items (sides, fruit, drink). Lighter weight signals secondary priority.

label.purpose: Section eyebrows, chip weekday abbreviations, captions. Always uppercase, always ≤4 words.

shadows.name: card-dark
shadows.purpose: All content cards in dark theme. Inset highlight simulates specular top edge; two-layer drop is ambient, not structural.

shadows.name: card-light
shadows.purpose: All content cards in light theme. Lighter, crisper. Inset top is full opaque white.

shadows.name: toggle-dark
shadows.purpose: Theme toggle in dark mode. Neutral ambient shadow.

shadows.name: toggle-light
shadows.purpose: Theme toggle in light mode. Blue-tinted glow links the button to the brand accent.

shadows.name: today-pulse
shadows.purpose: Animated box-shadow for the today chip's pulse glow (50% keyframe of todayPulse). Never static.

motion.name: chip-spring
motion.purpose: Day chip selection entrance — scale 0.86 → 1. Springing without bounce.

motion.name: slide-day
motion.purpose: Day card slide-in-left / slide-in-right on day tab change.

motion.name: section-fade
motion.purpose: Section blocks fadeIn with 8px translateY. Staggered 55ms per section, entree at 0ms.

motion.name: shimmer
motion.purpose: Skeleton loading shimmer. Linear intentional — simulates a scan, not a pulse.

motion.name: today-pulse
motion.purpose: Infinite box-shadow glow on today chip when not selected. Slow, ambient.

motion.name: sun-pulse
motion.purpose: No-school emoji scale + rotate loop. Playful, unhurried.

motion.name: flip-count
motion.purpose: Countdown number flip on day change. rotateX 0→90→-90→0. Requires perspective: 300px on parent.

motion.name: confetti-fall
motion.purpose: Confetti pieces fall with gravity acceleration. Delay 0–1.8s per piece for organic feel.

motion.name: theme-crossfade
motion.purpose: Background, border-color, color, box-shadow transition on theme switch.

motion.name: dot-pulse
motion.purpose: Status dot opacity pulse during background refresh. opacity 1→0.35→1.

motion.name: hint-fade
motion.purpose: Swipe hint fade-out. Holds at 0.75 opacity for first 50%, fades to 0 over remaining 50%.

breakpoints.name: narrow
breakpoints.purpose: Day-head switches to column layout; countdown goes full-width at ≤360px.

breakpoints.name: max-app
breakpoints.purpose: App shell max-width. Above this, the app is centered on a dark body background.

components.name: Day Chip (Default)
components.description: Week navigation tab. Unselected rest state.
components.css: .ds-day-chip { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-chip-weekday { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .ds-chip-day { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; } .ds-day-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Day Chip (Active)
components.description: Week navigation tab — selected state. Fills with Action Blue, springs in.
components.css: .ds-day-chip { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #2563eb; cursor: pointer; } .ds-day-chip--active { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; animation: chipSpring 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } @keyframes chipSpring { from { transform: scale(0.86); } to { transform: scale(1); } } .ds-chip-weekday { font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; } .ds-chip-day { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Entree Block
components.description: Primary content card. Always first in the day view. Featured variant when ≥3 items.
components.html:
🍗 Entree

  • Pepperoni Pizza
  • Cheese Pizza
  • Veggie Pizza
components.css: .ds-entree-block { padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.065); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.09), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); animation: sectionFadeIn 0.3s ease forwards; } .ds-entree-block--featured { background: linear-gradient(160deg, color-mix(in srgb, #3b82f6 12%, rgba(255,255,255,0.065)), rgba(255,255,255,0.065)); } @keyframes sectionFadeIn { from { opacity: 0.001; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .ds-sec-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; color: #60a5fa; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-entree-block ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-entree-block li { font-size: 21px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.2; margin: 0 0 2px; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Section Block
components.description: Secondary food category card. Two-column grid; wide variant spans both columns.
components.html:
🥗 Sides

  • Garden Salad
  • Steamed Broccoli
components.css: .ds-section-block { padding: 11px 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.065); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.09), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); animation: sectionFadeIn 0.3s ease forwards; } @keyframes sectionFadeIn { from { opacity: 0.001; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .ds-sec-label { font-size: 0.6875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; margin: 0 0 5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-section-block ul { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-section-block li { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.35; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); margin-bottom: 1px; }

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Dark/light mode toggle. Top-right of header. Circular.
components.css: .ds-theme-toggle { width: 42px; height: 42px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; transition: transform 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease; } .ds-theme-toggle:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-theme-toggle:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-theme-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Refresh Menu Button
components.description: Primary action button in the empty/error state. Full-width on mobile.
components.css: .ds-btn-refresh { border: 0; border-radius: 14px; background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; padding: 12px 16px; min-width: 140px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.1s ease; } .ds-btn-refresh:hover { background: #3b82f6; } .ds-btn-refresh:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-refresh:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-refresh:disabled { cursor: wait; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Today Shortcut
components.description: Appears in the meta-row when viewing a non-today day. Quick return to today.
components.html: <button class="ds-today-shortcut" type="button" aria-label="Jump to today's menu">Today</button>
components.css: .ds-today-shortcut { border: 1px solid #3b82f6; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: #60a5fa; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 2px 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-today-shortcut:hover { background: #2563eb; color: #ffffff; border-color: #2563eb; } .ds-today-shortcut:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: 6x6px circle in the header meta-row. Color encodes data freshness.
components.css: .ds-status-dot { display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; margin-right: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-dot--fresh { background: #22c55e; } .ds-status-dot--stale { background: #f59e0b; } .ds-status-dot--offline { background: #ef4444; } .ds-status-dot--refreshing { animation: dotPulse 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dotPulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.35; } }

components.name: School Countdown
components.description: Countdown widget showing days until school ends. Visible May 1 through last day. Features flip animation.
components.html: School ends in 29 days · Jun 12
components.css: .ds-school-countdown { min-width: 80px; padding: 7px 10px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #3b82f6 35%, rgba(255,255,255,0.08)); border-radius: 14px; background: color-mix(in srgb, #3b82f6 9%, rgba(255,255,255,0.065)); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.68); text-align: right; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.4; perspective: 300px; } .ds-countdown-value { color: #60a5fa; font-weight: 900; } .ds-countdown-date { font-weight: 600; } .ds-countdown-value.flipping { animation: flipCount 0.38s ease-in-out; } @keyframes flipCount { 0% { transform: rotateX(0deg); opacity: 1; } 40% { transform: rotateX(90deg); opacity: 0; } 60% { transform: rotateX(-90deg); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: rotateX(0deg); opacity: 1; } }

narrative.overview:
This system disappears into its task. The interface exists to deliver one piece of information — what is for lunch today — and then yield. Every design decision is evaluated against that principle: does this help the student glance and go, or does it demand attention the task doesn't warrant?

The system is calm at rest and confident in motion. Transitions confirm selection rather than decorate it; the countdown number flips like a physical display rather than fading; confetti erupts exactly once per school year. Playfulness is rationed.

The dual theme (dark default, light optional) honors the physical context. Students check this in the hallway, under fluorescent lights, in dim homerooms. Dark is the right call for the modal use case.
keyCharacteristics: Single-column, full-viewport, no sidebars or nav chrome
Content hierarchy: entree first, everything else secondary
System font stack: zero FOUT, native weight rendering at any DPI
Dual theme driven by CSS custom properties on [data-theme]

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue (#3b82f6) and Action Blue (#2563eb) are variants of one accent. No second accent hue is permitted.

rules.name: The Status-Only Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, and red are semantic status colors exclusively. Prohibited on cards, labels, chips, or any decorative surface.

rules.name: The Label Cap Rule
rules.body: ALL CAPS is reserved for labels of ≤4 words at label scale (≤11px). No sentence-case text is set in all-caps.

rules.name: The No FOUT Rule
rules.body: No web fonts are loaded. The system font stack is non-negotiable for this use case.

rules.name: The Blur-is-Chrome Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter: blur(12px) is used only on chrome that is position:sticky with content scrolling behind it. Cards do not blur.

rules.name: The Flat-Card Rule
rules.body: Cards are flat at rest and flat on hover. Only :active fires (scale 0.97). Hover elevation lift is prohibited.

dos: Do keep the entree as the first and largest content block on every day view.
Do use the system font stack exclusively. No custom fonts.
Do use Signal Blue (#3b82f6) and Action Blue (#2563eb) for all interactive affordances.
Do use backdrop-filter: blur(12px) only on position:sticky chrome elements.
Do stagger section entrance animations by 55ms per section.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with animation: none !important.
Do use clamp() scale for display and title text.
Do test touch targets at 44x44px minimum.
donts: Don't add sidebar navigation, widget grids, or dashboard layout patterns.
Don't add photography, hero images, or marketing chrome.
Don't introduce a second accent color.
Don't apply backdrop-filter to cards or decorative surfaces.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards.
Don't add gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient).
Don't animate layout properties (height, padding, margin, width).
Don't add section eyebrows above new sections.
Don't set body copy or list items in all-caps.
Don't build a heavy school-district portal: no cluttered header, no desktop-first layout.
